title: svelte-aria components.json
description: Configuration for the svelte-aria CLI: where copied components land and how their imports are rewritten.

$schema.description: URL of this schema, for editor validation.

css.description: Path to the Tailwind entry CSS, relative to the project root (e.g. src/app.css). The svelte-aria @import is merged in here.

aliases.description: Import aliases that decide where items land and how imports are rewritten.

utils.description: Where the cn util is written (e.g. $lib/utils).

lib.description: Where primitives, state, and styles are written (e.g. $lib/svelte-aria).
